label: 1541 CE
era_summary: Year 1541 (MDXLI) was a common year starting on Saturday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1541: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Pope-Papal States, Camerino, 1540-45; Turkey-emperor, Papal states, 1541-44. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1541: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain-Mexico (northern), 1540-42; Spain-Chile, 1540-61. Maddison records GDP/capita 1505 (ESP, 1541) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
